---
title: "Signed Languages"
---

::: {.callout-tip}
# Learning Goals: Signed languages
1. Recognize signed languages as linguistically equivalent to spoken languages
1. Describe evidence for this claim: The same brain network underlies the processing of spoken and signed languages
1. Name one area of current controversy
:::

| Date | Topic | Reading | Resources |
| -- | -- | -- | -- | -- |
| Thurs 10/22 | Sign language linguistics | Newport & Supalla (1999) |<span class="blue-badge"> Slides ↗</span>|
| Tues 10/27 | Sign language in the brain |  Hickok, Bellugi, & Klima (1998) | |


<!-- Mentimeter: Myth check 
- Sign languages are not real languges
- sign languages: processed in LH language areas or RH visual areas
-->
